title: Morning Energy
subtitle: Wake up gently. Greet the day.

cues.text:
Sit tall, either in bed or in a chair.
Feet on the floor if you can.
Rest your hands on your knees, palms facing up.

Close your eyes and take a big, welcoming breath in —
as if you're breathing in the morning itself.
Hold it for just a moment...
and release, fully.

Again, a big inhale... and a full exhale.
One more.

Feel your spine lengthen.
Let your chest open a little more, with each breath.

This is a new day.
Not the same as yesterday.
Fresh. Clean. Yours.

Think of one thing, just one —
that you're looking forward to today.
It doesn't have to be big.
A cup of coffee. A conversation. A task you actually want to do.

Hold that image for a moment.
Let it light something up in you.

Now take a breath and fill yourself with intention.
What kind of person do you want to be today?
How do you want to show up, for yourself... for others?

Don't overthink it.
Just feel it.

Roll your shoulders back.
Take a full, energizing breath, in... hold... and out.

Your body is waking up.
Your mind is coming online.
You have everything you need, for today.

Take one more deep breath.
Open your eyes. Sit with it, just another second.

Now, go.
The day is yours.
